parameters.functionCode:
const body = $json.body || {};

const tongTienThietHai = parseFloat(body.tongTienThietHai) || 0;
const tongTienKhieuNai = parseFloat(body.tongTienKhieuNai) || 0;
const phanTramKN = tongTienThietHai > 0
  ? ((tongTienKhieuNai / tongTienThietHai) * 100).toFixed(1)
  : '0';

const pad = n => String(n).padStart(4, '0');
const caseId = 'HL-' + pad(Math.floor(Math.random() * 9000) + 1000);

return [{ json: {
  caseId,
  timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
  email:           body.email || '',
  hoTen:           body.hoTen || '',
  sdt:             body.sdt || '',
  facebook:        body.facebook || '',
  tinhThanh:       body.tinhThanh || '',
  kenhLienLac:     body.kenhLienLac || '',
  emailLienHe:     body.emailLienHe || '',
  chiTietDonHang:  body.chiTietDonHang || '',
  tongTienThietHai,
  tongTienKhieuNai,
  phanTramKN,
  ngayGdDauTien:   body.ngayGdDauTien || '',
  ngayGdCuoi:      body.ngayGdCuoi || '',
  sanPhamChinh:    body.sanPhamChinh || '',
  daLienHeShop:    body.daLienHeShop || '',
  coHtmlMessenger: body.coHtmlMessenger || '',
  ghiChuThem:      body.ghiChuThem || '',
  moTaChuyenKhoan: body.moTaChuyenKhoan || '',
  moTaTinNhan:     body.moTaTinNhan || '',
  moTaSanPham:     body.moTaSanPham || '',
  linkVideo:       body.linkVideo || '',
  moTaVideo:       body.moTaVideo || '',
  linkDriveFolder: body.linkDriveFolder || '',
  driveFolderId:   body.driveFolderId || '',
  soFileUpload:    parseInt(body.soFileUpload) || 0,
  tinhTrangBC:     body.tinhTrangBC || ''
}}];
